global.description: The ad features a bold red background with promotional text and food images.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A vibrant red background fills the canvas, creating a bold and eye-catching base for the ad.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo 'CraveLoop' is displayed prominently at the top, featuring a modern font in white against the red background.

elements.label: Food images
elements.description: Two stylized images of food items are centered, depicted with simple outlines and a minimalistic design.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A circular decorative element is placed in the center, adding visual interest without specific detail.

elements.label: Additional food image
elements.description: A smaller food image is centered, featuring a simple outline similar to the main food images.

elements.label: Additional food image
elements.description: Another food image is centered, maintaining the minimalistic style with a simple outline.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element is centered, complementing the overall design without specific detail.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: A stylized decorative element is centered, adding to the visual appeal of the ad.

elements.label: Additional food image
elements.description: A smaller food image is centered, featuring a simple outline consistent with the other food images.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Learn more' in bold, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Additional button
elements.description: A smaller button below the main CTA, maintaining the same style but less prominent.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: The text 'Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby' is displayed in a large, bold font at the center, conveying the main message.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A button at the bottom with the text 'Learn more', designed to encourage user interaction.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo 'CraveLoop' appears at the top left, designed in a modern font style.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the text 'SALE' at the top right, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label 'UGC' at the top left, suggesting user-generated content or reviews.
